name: Corn and Asparagus Quesadillas
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup chopped Vidalia onion or other sweet onion
1 1/2 cups fresh, thin asparagus (about 9 to 10 stalks), cut into 1-inch pieces
1 cup fresh or frozen corn kernels (thawed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F (230°C).
2. Place four tortillas on ungreased baking sheets.
3. Sprinkle each tortilla evenly with cheese, onion, asparagus, and corn.
4. If desired, add cooked shrimp.
5. Top each tortilla with the remaining ingredients.
6. Bake for 8 to 12 minutes or until the tortillas are slightly crisp and the cheese is melted.
7. Cut quesadillas into quarters.
8. Serve with desired toppings (sliced avocado, salsa, sour cream).
9. Yield: 4 to 8 servings.
